title: Optimize CloudWatch Metric Streams to Reduce Monitoring Costs
description:
CloudWatch Metric Streams costs had ballooned to $80/month due to redundant metrics, including leftover Vapor-related streams that were no longer needed after the Vapor prototype was abandoned.

## Required Actions
1. Remove redundant CloudWatch metric streams, especially Vapor-related streams
2. Narrow the scope of remaining CloudWatch monitoring to focus on errors and latency specifically for Lambda services
3. Review and clean up the metric streams list in the us-west-2 region
acceptance_criteria: Redundant CloudWatch metric streams are removed, including Vapor-related streams
Remaining metric streams are scoped to Lambda service errors and latency
Monthly CloudWatch Metric Streams cost is reduced significantly from $80/month
No critical monitoring gaps are introduced by the cleanup
implementation_notes: CloudWatch Metric Streams configured at: https://us-west-2.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudwatch/home?region=us-west-2#metric-streams:streamsList. Vapor streams should be removed since the Vapor approach was abandoned (MBT-497).
